findings.evidence: `nl -ba code/TauCeti/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/HilbertBasisMap.lean` shows `@[expose]` at line 31; roadmap target only asks for `HilbertBasis.mapₗᵢ` with `@[simp] mapₗᵢ_apply` at `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/OrthogonalL2Bases/README.md:273`.
findings.fix: Remove `@[expose]`; if a downstream proof still needs unfolding, add the specific characteristic lemma rather than exposing the body.
findings.issue: `HilbertBasis.mapₗᵢ` is marked `@[expose]`, making the construction body part of the public surface even though downstream users can use `mapₗᵢ_repr`, `mapₗᵢ_apply`, `coe_mapₗᵢ`, `mapₗᵢ_refl`, and `mapₗᵢ_trans` instead.

summary: The public API mostly provides the intended transport and consumer lemmas, but the definition body is unnecessarily exposed. The roadmap target only needs the transport plus `mapₗᵢ_apply`, and this PR already supplies characteristic lemmas for users to avoid unfolding.
